description: Balanced support-oriented scoring across protection support recovery governance transformation exposure reduction burden shifting and implementation burden.
Prioritizes protective effectiveness while still penalizing burden shifting.
Prioritizes material support and the resources needed to adapt or recover.
Prioritizes accessible recovery systems for households communities and small organizations.
Prioritizes participation co-determination legitimacy and community authority.
Prioritizes structural change and repair of systems that repeatedly produce vulnerability.
Prioritizes reducing repeated exposure rather than normalizing endurance.
Strongly penalizes strategies that shift cost risk labor debt displacement or surveillance onto exposed groups.
